items.title: Building a Cookie Editor Chrome Extension — Why I Built CookieJar After EditThisCookie Died
items.summary:
EditThisCookie Is Gone — Now What?


In late 2024, EditThisCookie — the most popular cookie editor for Chrome with millions of users — was removed from the Chrome Web Store. The reason: it never migrated to Manifest V3.

items.title: Ramp in talks to hit $40B+ valuation, 6 months after reaching $32B
items.summary: The company is reportedly in talks to raise another $750 million at a pre-money valuation of more than $40 billion. It last raised in November at $32 billion.

items.title: OpenAI launches new voice intelligence features in its API
items.summary: The new features could be handy for customer service systems, but OpenAI says they have applications that work across a variety of other fields, including education and creator platforms.

items.title: Kodiak AI raises $100M at a steep discount, sending its stock tumbling 37%
items.summary: The company made a series of other announcements during earnings, including a new commercial contract, a pilot program in Canada, and a collaboration.

items.title: Disney looking to make a unified ‘super app,’ report says
items.summary: Disney CEO Josh D'Amaro, who took over for Bob Iger earlier this year, has emphasized his intent to streamline the Disney experience.

items.title: Voi founders’ new AI startup Pit has become the latest rising star out of Stockholm
items.summary: AI startup Pit is led by the co-founders of European scooter giant Voi and backed by a16z, which is leading the startup’s $16 million seed round.

items.title: Hackers deface school login pages after claiming another Instructure hack
items.summary: The cybercrime group ShinyHunters claimed to have hacked Instructure again, defacing the login pages of several Instructure customer schools with an extortion message.

items.title: Gusto hits $1B revenue, a figure that brings it closer to public markets
items.summary: Gusto has shared an impressive milestone on its actual revenue, not an ARR number that estimates future income.

items.title: OpenAI introduces new ‘Trusted Contact’ safeguard for cases of possible self-harm
items.summary: The company is expanding its efforts to protect ChatGPT users in cases where conversations may turn to self-harm.

items.title: Tesla Model Y is first car to meet new US driver assistance safety benchmark
items.summary: The new benchmark rating applies to 2026 Tesla Model Y vehicles assembled on or after November 12, 2025.

items.title: Perplexity’s Personal Computer is now available to everyone on Mac
items.summary: Perplexity's Personal Computer brings AI agents to your Mac, and is now open to everyone.

items.title: Elon Musk’s lawsuit is putting OpenAI’s safety record under the microscope
items.summary: Elon Musk's legal effort to dismantle OpenAI may hinge on how its for-profit subsidiary enhances or detracts from the frontier lab's founding mission of ensuring that humanity benefits from artificial general intelligence.

items.title: Bumble is getting rid of the swipe, CEO says
items.summary: Based on Whitney Wolfe Herd's past comments about Bumble's new direction, the company is expected to lean into AI -- Bumble is even working on an AI dating assistant called Bee, and the CEO has made many comments over the years about how AI will be "a supercharger to love and relationships."

items.title: Tome, another Goodreads book-tracker rival, shuts down
items.summary: Built on the back of the sizable and influential BookTok community -- creators who discuss and review books on TikTok -- the app offered readers a place to chronicle and rate their books, get recommendations, and even add photos of things like favorite quotes or memes, or share playlists that match

items.title: Could Lovable’s automatic 10% pay raise be the cure for toxic cultures?
items.summary: Stockholm-based vibe-coding platform Lovable is offering employees an automatic 10% raise as a way to sidestep classic corporate politics.

items.title: Hackers hack victims hacked by other hackers
items.summary: An unknown group of hackers is breaking into systems previously breached by the cybercrime group TeamPCP. Once inside, the hackers immediately kick out TeamPCP and remove its hacking tools from the victims’ systems.

items.title: Kalshi doubles valuation in 5 months, hitting $22B
items.summary: Prediction market startup Kalshi has raised a $1 billion Series F round led by Coatue.

items.title: Jeff Bezos rep leaves Slate Auto’s board
items.summary: Melinda Lewison's departure raises questions about Bezos' support and involvement with the startup at a time when the Amazon founder is now apparently focused on robotics at his new startup, Project Prometheus.

items.title: How Anthropic’s Mythos has rewritten Firefox’s approach to cybersecurity
items.summary: Security researchers at Mozilla say Anthropic's Mythos has unearthed a wealth of high-severity bugs in Firefox.

items.title: Google’s $9.99-per-month AI health coach launches May 19
items.summary: The Gemini-powered health coach will act as a combination fitness coach, sleep expert, and health and wellness advisor.
